# Blue Skies Boat Rentals

> Premium bareboat rentals in Islamorada, Florida Keys. Grady White boats available bareboat or with a USCG-licensed captain.

## About
Blue Skies Boat Rentals is a premium boat rental company based in Islamorada, FL — the sport fishing capital of the world. Founded by two Wall Street professionals, we bring a white-glove service approach to boat rentals in the Florida Keys. We serve the area from Key Largo to Marathon.

## Fleet
- **Freedom** — Grady White Freedom 285, 28ft dual console, capacity 8 passengers. Twin Yamaha 300HP engines, Garmin GPS & fish finder, Bluetooth sound system, freshwater shower, onboard head, livewell & rod holders, shade top, cooler, snorkeling gear available.

## Pricing
- Half Day (8am–12pm or 1pm–5pm): $700
- Full Day (8am–5pm): $900
- Multi-Day: $800/day
- Captain add-on available (optional — all rentals are bareboat by default)

## Location
- **Address:** Islamorada, Florida Keys, FL
- **Service area:** Key Largo, Islamorada, Marathon, and surrounding Keys
- **Departure ports:** Islamorada area marinas

## Popular Activities
- Sandbar trips (Islamorada sandbar, Indian Key)
- Snorkeling (Alligator Reef, Cheeca Rocks, San Pedro wreck)
- Offshore & backcountry fishing
- Sunset cruises
- Island hopping (Indian Key, Lignumvitae Key)
- Lobster mini-season trips

## Booking
- Book online: https://blueskiesboatrentals.com/book
- Text/Call: (516) 587-0438
- Same-day bookings available when fleet is open
- Loyalty program: 1 point per $1 spent. Captain tier ($5,000+) gets 10% off, First Mate tier ($2,500+) gets 5% off.
